meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Slow Development
content.seo_description: Stop wasting time on boilerplate. Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-quality client projects at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. A high-leverage SaaS starter kit abstracts authentication, database schema, and payment integration into a reusable, modular core. By combining Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for automated implementation, you reduce development time by 70%, allowing you to focus purely on high-margin client features.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and you're still wrestling with database migrations and boilerplate authentication. Every hour spent configuring the plumbing of a new SaaS is an hour stolen from your bottom line and your creative potential. The most successful freelancers don't build apps; they build systems that build apps for them.

Imagine a workflow where the heavy lifting is handled before you even write your first line of custom logic. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you transform from a manual coder into a precision architect. It’s time to stop reinventing the wheel and start shipping products that dominate the market.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project structure with a hardened boilerplate to ensure type safety and consistent directory patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Next.js 15 project structure with Drizzle ORM, NextAuth, and Tailwind CSS. Ensure strict TypeScript configuration and modular folder structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project scaffold with chosen tech stack'

steps.title: Configure Database Schema
steps.description: Define your core models once and use automated migrations to keep your development environment in sync with production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Drizzle schema for a SaaS platform including User, Subscription, and Project entities with proper relational indexing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate Drizzle migrations based on the new schema'

steps.title: Implement Authentication Flow
steps.description: Secure your application with pre-built auth providers, handling session management and protected routes automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up NextAuth with Google and Email providers, including a middleware file to protect /dashboard routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement NextAuth middleware and session handling'

steps.title: Integrate Payment Infrastructure
steps.description: Connect Stripe webhooks and checkout sessions to your backend to ensure seamless billing cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe API handler for subscription management and webhook validation for subscription.updated events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add Stripe subscription logic and webhook handler'

steps.title: Automate UI Component Injection
steps.description: Rapidly populate your dashboard with pre-styled, accessible UI components to finalize the client-facing experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable Card component and a Data Table component using Radix UI and Tailwind.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create consistent UI components for the dashboard'

pro_tips: Always wrap your database queries in a service layer to decouple business logic from the ORM.
Use environment variable validation (like Zod) to prevent runtime crashes during deployment.
Implement feature flags early so you can deploy incomplete features without breaking the main branch.
Standardize your error handling by creating a custom global error boundary and API response wrapper.
Keep your starter kit in a private GitHub repository and use 'template' mode to instantiate new client projects instantly.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is refined, document your standard operating procedure (SOP) for new projects to ensure consistency across your freelance portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading hours for dollars and start scaling your output with professional-grade infrastructure. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
